metadata.og:description: Hey I am having trouble adding community nodes in cloud. There is no “+” or “Install” on the Setting → Community Nodes page (see below). Is anyone able to offer advice?  Thanks in advance  Teddy     , please follow the template below. Skip the questions that are not relevant to you. →   Describe the problem/error/question What is the error message (if any)?
